_label_tier_note: CN Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: CN Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed CN/AE Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Issuer to acquire 60% equity of Target for aggregate consideration RMB 420,000,000, funded by a non-public issuance of A-shares to no more than 35 qualified investors and cash on hand; expected to constitute a material asset restructuring reaching ≥10% of Issuer’s audited net assets
any analyst interaction occurs only after disclosure on SSE-designated media and within information already public
communications in WeCom/钉钉 groups shall not reference non-public valuation terms
two (2) full trading days after the first public disclosure
during the 30 calendar days before the publication of the 2026 H1 interim report
cross-border transfer (if any, e.g., to Issuer’s Hong Kong affiliate) requires CAC 安全评估 or standard contract filing before export
only de-identified HR records may be shared pre-closing

Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition and Private Placement (PRC law; SSE STAR Market context); Issuer: Huashi Robotics Co., Ltd. (华实机器人股份有限公司，科创板发行人，USCC: 9 1 3 1 Z X 3 0 0 0 0 X 2 4 T); Target: Ninghai MicroPower Technologies Co., Ltd. (宁海微能科技有限公司，USCC: 9 2 3 3 0 ** 0 L 7 8 9 0 1 2 Q)

Transaction: Issuer to acquire 60% equity of Target for aggregate consideration RMB 420,000,000, funded by a non-public issuance of A-shares to no more than 35 qualified investors and cash on hand; expected to constitute a material asset restructuring reaching ≥10% of Issuer’s audited net assets

Financing: Proposed private placement to Beijing Yucheng Evergreen Equity Investment Partnership (LP) and others (each an “Investor”); per-share subscription price to be determined by bookbuilding not lower than 80% of the benchmark price in accordance with SSE STAR Market rules

Conditions precedent: (i) STAR Market review and CSRC registration of the restructuring/issuance, (ii) SAMR anti-monopoly filing clearance (if required), (iii) completion of financial, tax, and legal DD with no findings that individually or in aggregate have issuer-relative materiality ≥5% of last year’s audited net profit, (iv) board and shareholders’ approvals

Data & PIPL compliance: Parties shall process personal information strictly per PIPL and CSL/DSL; no minors under 14 will be included in any data room; cross-border transfer (if any, e.g., to Issuer’s Hong Kong affiliate) requires CAC 安全评估 or standard contract filing before export; only de-identified HR records may be shared pre-closing

Employment & integration: No collective layoff is contemplated; employee consultation and retention plan to be disclosed in the restructuring report; no change to existing social insurance accounts; offer letters for key personnel will exclude any resident minors; no change to standard leave policy is effected by this term sheet

Closing & post-closing: Closing within 6 months of CSRC registration effectiveness; escrow of RMB 42,000,000 for 12 months against specific indemnities; earn-out tied to 2027 audited net profit of Target; integration will not trigger DSL “重要数据” outbound transfer without prior assessment
